data.title: Giftify’s CardCash Reports 14.2% Sell-Side Volume Growth and 18.5% Rise in New Seller Acquisition Through Early Q1 2026, Expanding Platform Supply Base
data.description: In the period between January 1 and March 15, a total of 70,954 sell orders were processed, marking a 14.2% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, 25,508 new sellers joined the platform in the first quarter of 2026, reflecting an 18.5% increase from the previous year. This surge in activity comes as CardCash boosts its marketplace inventory in anticipation of heightened demand during the upcoming spring season.

data.title: Turbo Energy Expects to Report 130%–140% Revenue Growth, Reaching $22.5 – $23.5 Million in 2025 Based on Preliminary Unaudited Results
data.description: The company is making progress in its shift towards becoming an AI-powered intelligent energy platform and has outlined its projections for 2026. The transformation will involve incorporating artificial intelligence to enhance its energy services. The company is looking ahead to 2026 as a key milestone in this strategic evolution, indicating their commitment to modernizing their operations.

data.title: CERo Therapeutics Doses Second Patient in Cohort 2 of Phase 1 CER-1236 Trial
data.description: The trial is progressing with continuous monitoring of safety and pharmacological effects, with intentions to expand into Myelodysplastic Syndromes (MDS) and Myelofibrosis (MF). The study will involve increasing the sample size to include more participants.

data.title: Eva Live Inc. Engages Anderson Kill P.C. to Execute Nasdaq Tokenization Strategy for GOAI
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Las Vegas, NV, Eva Live Inc. (NASDAQ: GOAI), a rapidly expanding company specializing in AI-driven digital advertising and marketing technology, revealed its collaboration with Anderson Kill P.C. to advance the implementation of a strategic plan. This initiative aims to align GOAI with Nasdaq's recent tokenization framework. Heading the Anderson Kill P.C. team is Louis L. Nock, a Shareholder and former New York State Supreme Court Justice known for his focus on the evolving legal, regulatory, and corporate dimensions of Digital Assets and Blockchain Technology.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Phreesia Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Phreesia, Inc. (PHR) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on March 30 after the markets close. Analysts are predicting earnings of 7 cents per share, compared to 18 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for Phreesia's quarterly revenue is $126.62 million, an increase from $109.68 million reported last year. The company recently secured a new $275 million revolving credit facility by refinancing its bridge loan on March 16. Phreesia's stock price dropped by 5.8% to $10.98 at the end of trading on Friday. For more insights and analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Empowering Change: The 15th Annual Survivorship Child Abuse Conference
data.description: Survivorship is pleased to announce the forthcoming Survivorship Trafficking and Extreme Abuse Online Conference 2026, set to take place from May 15 to 17 in TARZANA, Calif. The event will offer specialized presentations tailored for survivors and clinicians.

data.title: Stratasys Selected for Multi-million Dollar U.S. Department of War Additive Manufacturing Program
data.description: Stratasys Ltd. revealed that its Stratasys Direct™ parts-on-demand division was chosen to participate in the U.S. Department of War’s (DoW) Joint Additive Manufacturing Acceptability (JAMA) IV Pilot Parts Program. This initiative, valued at multimillion dollars, aims to hasten the approval and integration of 3D-printed components into military equipment and machinery. The Program of Record for both the U.S. Air Force and Naval Air Systems will oversee this operation.

data.title: o9 to Host aim10x Summits 2026 in Amsterdam and Chicago
data.description: Dallas-based software company, o9, known for its innovative AI-powered Digital Brain platform, is set to host the aim10x Summits 2026 series. This global in-person event will showcase how enterprises are transforming planning and decision-making in various industries. The aim10x Europe 2026 summit is scheduled for June 4 at Circa in Amsterdam. o9 caters to over 30 industries and aims to revolutionize strategic processes through their cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Guardant Health’s InfinityAI Real-World Evidence Supports Approval of ENHERTU® for Previously Treated Patients with HER2-Positive Metastatic Solid Tumors in Japan
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Guardant Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GH), a prominent precision oncology firm, revealed that real-world evidence from Guardant’s InfinityAI aided in the approval of ENHERTU® (trastuzumab deruxtecan) by Daiichi Sankyo (TSE:4568) in Japan. This approval is for treating patients with HER2-positive (HER2 [ERBB2] gene amplification or immunohistochemistry [IHC] 3+) advanced or recurrent solid cancers refractory or intolerant to prior anti-HER2 therapy.

data.title: Hyperlink InfoSystem Named a Top Mobile App Development Company in India 2026 by TopSoftwareCompanies.co
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in New York and Los Angeles, a growing trend in the business world is the shift towards prioritizing mobile strategies to maintain competitiveness and relevance in the digital age. Companies of all sizes, from small startups to large corporations, are recognizing the need to focus on mobile applications. This approach is seen as essential for meeting the demands of consumers in an evolving market.

data.title: PMI U.S. BRINGS TECHNOVATION TO WASHINGTON D.C.
data.description: Philip Morris International (PMI) is launching Technovation, its global science and innovation platform, in the United States. The aim is to bring leaders together to drive progress towards a smoke-free future. This initiative was announced on March 30, 2026, and PMI is listed on the NYSE as PM. The platform will focus on new technologies and research to support this goal.

data.title: Westinghouse Celebrates Record-breaking 80 Years of Nuclear Fuel Manufacture at Springfields
data.description: A notable achievement was recently celebrated at the Westinghouse Springfields site in Lancashire, UK, as it holds the title of being the oldest uninterrupted nuclear fuel manufacturing facility worldwide. Its operations began under an official license on March 28, 1946. Initially selected by the UK Government for nuclear fuel production for the earliest global civil nuclear power plants, including the Magnox and Advanced Gas Reactors (AGR) reactors. Over a span of 80 years, the Springfields facility has been pivotal in the development and supply of nuclear fuel, playing a vital role in the energy sector's evolution.

data.title: Altus Power Completes Solar Project at San Manuel Landing in San Bernardino, California
data.description: Altus Power, a prominent commercial-scale energy company, has revealed the successful deployment and launch of a rooftop solar initiative at San Manuel Landing in San Bernardino, California. This project, developed in collaboration with Trammell Crow Company and the Yuhaaviatam of San Manuel Nation (YSMN), is situated at a cutting-edge 1.1 million square foot Class-A industrial logistics hub. Through extended contracts, Altus Power is leasing the rooftop space for this solar installation.
SCIENTURE releases 2025 financial results, offers business update.

data.title: PINE BLUFF WINS NATIONAL COMPETITIVE T-MOBILE GRANT FOR "BLUES JUNCTION" LANDMARK MONUMENT
data.description: Pine Bluff, Arkansas has been chosen as one of only 25 recipients out of 900 applicants to host a monument commemorating the Delta Blues heritage. The 20-foot tall landmark will pay tribute to J. Mayo "Ink" Williams, a member of the Blues Hall of Fame. It will be located at the intersection of the National Blues and Heritage Tourism Corridors in Pine Bluff. The announcement was made on March 30, 2026.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From TD Synnex Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: TD Synnex Corporation (SNX) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on March 31. Analysts are predicting earnings of $3.31 per share for this quarter, an increase from the previous year's $2.80 per share. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $15.65 billion, up from the $14.53 billion reported last year. With TD Synnex's current annual dividend yield sitting at 1.22%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 48 cents per share ($1.92 annually), investors may be considering potential gains from dividends. To earn $500 per month from TD Synnex, an investor would need to target $6,000 annually ($500 x 12 months) and divide this by the $1.92 dividend, resulting in the need for 3,125 shares. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
